'''Motamba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] munitions expert who served in the [[Kashyyyk resistance/Legends|Wookiee underground resistance movement]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Motamba was one of the Wookiees who spearheaded the search for the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] thief [[Kea Ra-Lan]] after she infiltrated [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and stole ancient texts from the vaults of [[Neocomora]].<ref name="wbc10">{{JournalCite|10|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}}</ref>
